mechanism_narrative: A higher CPIAUCSL reading with FEDFUNDS still elevated keeps real-rate expectations firm and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days as markets price slower disinflation and less near-term easing.
regime_hint: inflation is sticky and policy is restrictive
failure_condition: Reject if CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS are both elevated but 10-year yields fall in more than 60% of 20-day windows or the sign agreement is below 55% across the sample.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE above its recent level signals labor-market slack and weaker demand, which lowers expected policy rates and pulls the 10-year Treasury yield down over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2pp versus the prior 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment rises are followed by higher 10-year yields in more than 55% of cases or if the average 20-day yield change is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS and GDPC1 both accelerate, investors infer stronger nominal demand and greater term-premium pressure, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to rise over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if concurrent strength in sales and real GDP fails to coincide with rising 10-year yields in at least 55% of rolling 60-day forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in INDPRO with HOUST recovering from weak levels signals easing supply constraints and improving growth supply capacity, which reduces inflation risk and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield down over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises above its prior 2-month average while INDPRO is flat or rising
failure_condition: Reject if housing starts and industrial production recoveries are not followed by lower yields in at least 55% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: FEDFUNDS above 4.5% with CPIAUCSL still rising indicates a restrictive policy stance that markets read as persistent inflation control, which lifts the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 5 trading days through repricing of the near policy path.
failure_condition: Reject if periods with FEDFUNDS above 4.5% do not show a positive 5-day yield response or if inflation-plus-tight-policy episodes produce negative yield changes more than 60% of the time.

mechanism_narrative: A falling PAYEMS trend together with a rising UNRATE confirms a deteriorating labor market, which lowers growth and inflation expectations and drives the 10-year Treasury yield down over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS declines for 2 consecutive months and UNRATE rises
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor deterioration signal is followed by higher yields in more than 45% of cases or if the mean 20-day yield change is nonnegative.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle expansion, a strong GDPC1 and RSAFS combination signals still-firm nominal demand that keeps the term premium elevated and causes the 10-year Treasury yield to rise over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if demand-strength periods in late-cycle conditions do not produce positive 60-day yield changes in a majority of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO is weakening while HOUST is also weak, the economy is losing real activity momentum and inflation pressure fades, so the 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below its prior 3-month average and HOUST stays below its prior 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous industrial and housing weakness fails to coincide with lower yields in at least 55% of triggered cases or if the average forward yield change is positive.
